p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ZW Laboratory Tests v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Xpert MTB/RIF or similar cartridge-based assay.
Line Probe Assay for drug-resistance testing.
HIV viral load from dried blood spot sample.
HIV viral load from plasma sample.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ZW National Laboratory List v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/lab/CodeSystem/zw-laboratories"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="ZWLHRE002"><display value="National Microbiology Reference Laboratory (NMRL)"></coding>

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ZW Reason for Test v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/lab/CodeSystem/zw-reason-for-test"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="repeat-after-adherence"><display value="Repeat After Enhanced Adherence Counselling"></coding>

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/lab/CodeSystem/zw-reason-for-test"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="eid-initial-6-8wks"><display value="EID: Initial at 6–8 Weeks"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/lab/CodeSystem/zw-reason-for-test"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="eid-initial-gt2m"><display value="EID: Initial at >2 Months"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/lab/CodeSystem/zw-reason-for-test"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="eid-repeat-6wks"><display value="EID: Repeat at 6 Weeks"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/lab/CodeSystem/zw-reason-for-test"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="eid-repeat-9m"><display value="EID: Repeat at 9 Months"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: EID: Following Positive RDT at >18 Months
EID after positive rapid test at >18 months.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/lab/CodeSystem/zw-reason-for-test"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="eid-positive-rdt-gt18m"><display value="EID: Following Positive RDT at >18 Months"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Confirmatory EID after first positive result.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://mohcc.gov.zw/fhir/lab/CodeSystem/zw-reason-for-test"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="eid-confirmatory"><display value="EID: Confirmatory (After First EID Positive)"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

display.value: EID: Following Positive RDT at >18 Months

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ZW Specimen Rejection Reasons v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Request form does not match the specimen.

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ZW Report Review State v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Result entry in progress; not yet submitted.
Report published and available to the requester.

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem ZW Specimen Types v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)
